HEADLINE: Shopping These Giant Yankee Candles are 40% off before Valentine's Day By Miska Salemann Published Feb
SOURCE: New York Post (News)

ARTICLE:

Shopping These Giant Yankee Candles are 40% off before Valentine's Day By Miska Salemann Published Feb. 11, 2026, 2:02 p.m. ET Amazon New York Post may be compensated and/or receive an affiliate commission if you click or buy through our links. Featured pricing is subject to change. They say scent sparks emotion. But for deal-hungry shoppers, a steep discount delivers its own kind of euphoria. Case in point: 22-ounce Yankee Candles are nearly half off on Amazon today, and they're expected to provide 150 hours of room-filling fragrance. So, I'm unwell. In the best way possible. Let's set the scene. It's Saturday, Feb. 14. You wake up, and (miraculously) remember the holiday you had marked down on your calendar. It's Valentine's Day. No need to jump out of bed, rush around the city and put together a last-minute swag bag for your loved one. You were smart and planned ahead, shopped early, and already grabbed the perfect candle to set the mood. Thousands of reviewers swoon over these candles, mentioning that they last much longer than other brands. "Great scent, high quality and value for the money," one pointed out. "Lasts much longer than other brands and utilizes most of the wax in the jar. A wonderful option for your home or as a gift." Plus, there are plenty of scents to pick from. Whether you're after something that smells sultry and intimate or just a joy-filled scent that makes their kitchen smell delightful, Yankee Candle has your Valentine's vibe completely handled. Yankee Candle Amazon From sun-soaked favorites like "Beach Walk" to the memory-evoking "Midsummer's Night" or soothing blends like "Quiet & Calm," — perfect for the person who desperately needs a deep breath — this beloved candle brand truly has a scent for everyone on your list. Yankee Candle uses a premium plant wax blend and natural-fiber wick for optimal fragrance performance, and the generous 22-ounce size should provide up to 150 hours of burn time. They're also made in America, and for a limited time, many of these scents are marked down to just $15. parsed_output.summary: The article highlights a significant sale on 22-ounce Yankee Candles, available for nearly 40% off on Amazon right before Valentine’s Day, reducing the price from $34.99 to $14.99. Yankee Candles, known for their quality and variety of scents—from 'Beach Walk' to 'Midsummer’s Night'—make them a popular gift for the holiday. With up to 150 hours of burn time, a premium plant wax blend, and positive customer reviews lauding their longevity, these candles are recommended as both gifts and home enhancers. The writer encourages readers to plan ahead for Valentine’s to avoid last-minute stress, presenting these candles as a practical and thoughtful option. The article also briefly mentions other limited-time Amazon deals, such as discounts on smart bird feeders, throw blankets, and coffee makers, underlining the broader opportunity for shoppers seeking holiday bargains. The New York Post discloses possible affiliate commissions on purchases made through its links. The writer, a commerce reporter, provides consumer-focused recommendations and personal testing background to build reader trust.
key_facts: 22-ounce Yankee Candles are discounted by nearly 40% on Amazon, now selling for $14.99.
The candles can burn up to 150 hours and are available in a wide variety of scents.
Customer reviews praise the value, scent quality, and longevity of Yankee Candles.
The article suggests purchasing these candles as Valentine’s Day gifts to avoid last-minute shopping stress.
Other notable Amazon deals highlighted include smart bird feeders, throw blankets, and coffee makers.
